Failure_Mode: Review-gate behavior is ambiguous in with-review E2E outcomes
Trigger_Threshold: Any release run in passed_expected_review_hold without approved exception
Mitigation_Plan: Define deterministic release assertion for with-review path
Contingency_Plan: Freeze prod release pending risk-board decision

Failure_Mode: Lock lifecycle remains race-prone with timeout/no auto-renew behavior
Trigger_Threshold: Lock conflict rate >2% weekly
Mitigation_Plan: Add lock-renew design and race-condition tests
Contingency_Plan: Restrict concurrent editors for high-priority forms

Failure_Mode: Aggregate E2E entrypoint and package graph overstate multi-form release coverage
Trigger_Threshold: Aggregate E2E command evidence does not include all release-significant forms/workflows
Mitigation_Plan: Require form-by-form release-path E2E matrix tied to CI gate checks
Contingency_Plan: Block merge/release to protected branch until matrix is complete

Failure_Mode: Test strategy and QA coverage documentation drift from active package runtime and scope
Trigger_Threshold: Any release-significant doc/runtime mismatch in package-level test strategy
Mitigation_Plan: Reconcile implementation docs to active runtime, scope, and CI invocation path
Contingency_Plan: Document temporary compensating controls and explicit expiry

Failure_Mode: Control docs are incomplete/placeholder-heavy in release-significant areas
Trigger_Threshold: Any critical control section remains placeholder at release checkpoint
Mitigation_Plan: Complete critical docs and link to runtime/test proof
Contingency_Plan: Require explicit short-lived exception at risk board

Failure_Mode: ML validation and inference controls permit non-production-like quality evidence and missing-feature fallback behavior
Trigger_Threshold: Missing grouped-holdout quality evidence or any missing-feature fallback in inference path
Mitigation_Plan: Enforce document-level grouped validation and fail-closed feature-contract checks in inference
Contingency_Plan: Route impacted forms to mandatory human review and suspend automated confidence claims

Failure_Mode: HIL deploy readiness shows environment/secret/reachability instability
Trigger_Threshold: HIL deploy success <99% in release runs
Mitigation_Plan: Stabilize secret/reachability policy and CI deploy path
Contingency_Plan: Controlled manual HIL deploy with checklist evidence

Failure_Mode: Partial extraction success paths and short-retention high-verbosity workflow logging weaken incident detection and forensics
Trigger_Threshold: Any partial extraction success path lacks explicit incident signal or workflow log retention falls below policy minimum
Mitigation_Plan: Add partial-processing telemetry + alerting and raise workflow log retention policy baseline
Contingency_Plan: Release freeze and temporary manual monitoring with forensic evidence capture

Failure_Mode: Restore/failover proof is incomplete for critical stores and workflows
Trigger_Threshold: Missing or failed restore drill within SLA
Mitigation_Plan: Execute restore/rollback drills and publish evidence
Contingency_Plan: Block cutover until successful drill + rollback proof

Failure_Mode: Vulnerability and SBOM control failures can be recorded without hard-failing release assurance path
Trigger_Threshold: Any failed vulnerability scan or SBOM generation in release pipeline, or any open critical vuln without acceptance
Mitigation_Plan: Enforce hard-fail policy for scan/SBOM generation and critical vulnerability thresholds
Contingency_Plan: Formal exception with compensating controls + expiry

Failure_Mode: Internal test-only approval path can diverge from production approval semantics
Trigger_Threshold: Test-only approval path used as release-signoff evidence
Mitigation_Plan: Separate dev-diagnostic and release-signoff paths
Contingency_Plan: Require manual sign-off using production-equivalent path

Failure_Mode: Multi-form release-path E2E execution remains incomplete while aggregate command implies broader coverage
Trigger_Threshold: Any supported release form/workflow absent from aggregate E2E command evidence
Mitigation_Plan: Implement and require all-form release validation plan with explicit command-to-form mapping
Contingency_Plan: Restrict release to forms with validated end-to-end evidence

Failure_Mode: With-review re-entry behavior remains unresolved in known gap list
Trigger_Threshold: Any with-review re-entry unresolved in release candidate
Mitigation_Plan: Resolve re-entry behavior and assertion contract
Contingency_Plan: Treat as release blocker for affected form path

Failure_Mode: Update lifecycle automation remains incomplete by documented admission
Trigger_Threshold: Automation maturity KPI below agreed minimum
Mitigation_Plan: Define automation roadmap milestones with owners
Contingency_Plan: Use manual sign-off gate until roadmap milestone met

Failure_Mode: Software update/change-management sections are TODO/incomplete
Trigger_Threshold: Any TODO section in release-significant governance docs
Mitigation_Plan: Complete update/change-management sections and controls
Contingency_Plan: Add temporary governance checklist gate

Failure_Mode: Offline deployment relies on manual DCOPs transfer scheduling
Trigger_Threshold: DCOP transfer latency exceeds release SLA
Mitigation_Plan: Define handoff SLA, backup approvers, and escalation tree
Contingency_Plan: Delay release and re-baseline cutover schedule

Failure_Mode: Transfer command example quality issues can cause runbook execution errors
Trigger_Threshold: Runbook command quality defects in release path docs
Mitigation_Plan: Add runbook lint/review checklist and command validation
Contingency_Plan: Require operator dry-run checklist before execution

Failure_Mode: Host deployment scripts tolerate prerequisite failures and rely on reboot/rerun recovery patterns
Trigger_Threshold: Deployment prerequisites fail but host deploy scripts continue, or rerun-only recovery is used
Mitigation_Plan: Convert fail-open setup steps to fail-closed scripts with explicit health checks and rollback guidance
Contingency_Plan: Require dual-control operator execution and sign-off

Failure_Mode: PR template does not enforce risk/security/rollback evidence
Trigger_Threshold: PRs missing risk/security/rollback evidence >0 for release scope
Mitigation_Plan: Add mandatory PR fields for risk, security, rollback, evidence links
Contingency_Plan: Block merge until template fields complete

Failure_Mode: Terraform backend approach differs across environments, including local root-host state in PP, increasing state-control inconsistency risk
Trigger_Threshold: State backend policy mismatch across environments or any release environment using local root-host state
Mitigation_Plan: Standardize backend policy with locking controls for all environments
Contingency_Plan: Hold promotion until state policy mismatch resolved

Failure_Mode: IAM/action scope appears broadly permissive in architecture-defined role policy examples
Trigger_Threshold: Wildcard IAM scope count above policy threshold
Mitigation_Plan: Tighten policies to least privilege and review exceptions
Contingency_Plan: Time-bound compensating control with access review cadence

Failure_Mode: Network security control documentation is incomplete
Trigger_Threshold: Network control docs incomplete at release review
Mitigation_Plan: Populate network security matrix with enforceable controls
Contingency_Plan: Security waiver with short expiry and focused monitoring

Failure_Mode: Failover/recovery sections are placeholders across core stores
Trigger_Threshold: Failover/recovery sections incomplete for critical stores
Mitigation_Plan: Define and validate failover/recovery procedures by store
Contingency_Plan: Block production cutover until recovery evidence exists

Failure_Mode: Dev host config includes fallback secrets for auth values
Trigger_Threshold: Any fallback secret present in active release configuration
Mitigation_Plan: Remove fallback secrets and require managed secret source only
Contingency_Plan: Halt release and rotate impacted credentials

Failure_Mode: Container image tags use mutable latest references in host config
Trigger_Threshold: Mutable image tag usage detected in release configuration
Mitigation_Plan: Pin image tags/digests in deploy paths
Contingency_Plan: Freeze deploy rollout pending digest pinning

Failure_Mode: Default Keycloak bootstrap/admin and DB passwords exist in service config defaults
Trigger_Threshold: Default admin/password values present in runtime configuration
Mitigation_Plan: Remove defaults and enforce secret injection precondition
Contingency_Plan: Rotate credentials and block release until verified

Failure_Mode: Infrastructure contains public exposure and destructive DB/S3 lifecycle defaults that materially weaken recoverability
Trigger_Threshold: Public exposure or destructive DB/S3 lifecycle defaults detected (including skip snapshots, force destroy, disabled versioning)
Mitigation_Plan: Harden SG/DB/S3 settings and add policy checks
Contingency_Plan: Pause release and apply compensating access controls

Failure_Mode: Static SSH authorized keys are embedded in instance user data
Trigger_Threshold: Static embedded SSH keys remain in infrastructure code
Mitigation_Plan: Move to managed key distribution and rotate keys
Contingency_Plan: Revoke exposed keys and audit host access

Failure_Mode: DVC workflow relies on manual push discipline; missing push breaks branch reproducibility
Trigger_Threshold: DVC/Nix reproducibility check fails for branch/release candidate
Mitigation_Plan: Enforce CI check for example-forms build and DVC object availability
Contingency_Plan: Block merge/release for data pointer changes

Failure_Mode: High complexity/churn hotspots in core workflows increase regression probability
Trigger_Threshold: Hotspot complexity trend worsens across release cycles
Mitigation_Plan: Execute hotspot decomposition plan with changed-file gates
Contingency_Plan: Restrict risky change windows and add dual-path validation

Failure_Mode: Optimism bias and strategic misrepresentation drive underestimated effort/risk and overstated delivery confidence
Trigger_Threshold: Forecast bias index >15% for 2 cycles or >30% in one cycle
Mitigation_Plan: Require independent estimate challenge and explicit bias-adjusted uplift before gate review
Contingency_Plan: Apply contingency reserve and re-baseline commitments before go/no-go

Failure_Mode: Average-based reporting masks fat-tail black swan overruns in schedule/cost exposure
Trigger_Threshold: Tail overrun incidence exceeds threshold or any >100% overrun without approved contingency
Mitigation_Plan: Add tail-distribution reporting and stress-test release plan at P95 assumptions
Contingency_Plan: Freeze release decision and trigger black-swan contingency review

Failure_Mode: Release planning relies on inside-view assumptions without reference class forecasting calibration
Trigger_Threshold: Reference class forecast coverage <100% for release-significant estimates
Mitigation_Plan: Build and enforce reference class library with documented comparator quality
Contingency_Plan: No-go until outside-view forecast packet is complete and approved

Failure_Mode: Form APIs expose workflow token-bearing form payloads and permit broad CRUD mutation paths outside state-transition controls
Owner_Role: Application Engineering Lead + Cloud Security Architect
Trigger_Threshold: Any API/form payload exposes workflow task token or direct CRUD mutation outside approved transition endpoints
Mitigation_Plan: Remove token exposure from browser payloads and enforce server-side transition-only mutation API
Contingency_Plan: Freeze release and rotate/void exposed workflow tokens

Failure_Mode: DEV_MODE pathways can bypass lock/session controls and log full session payloads in protected routes
Owner_Role: Application Engineering Lead + Cloud Security Architect
Trigger_Threshold: Any non-dev deployment with DEV_MODE enabled or middleware logs full session payloads
Mitigation_Plan: Add startup guardrails that hard-fail non-dev when DEV_MODE=true and remove sensitive session logging
Contingency_Plan: Halt release and perform environment + logging remediation review

Failure_Mode: Shared DynamoDB update helper is non-atomic and swallows client errors while used in multiple workflow lambdas
Trigger_Threshold: Any workflow write path uses non-conditional shared update helper or swallows Dynamo client errors
Mitigation_Plan: Add conditional/versioned update contract and fail on write errors with alerting
Contingency_Plan: Freeze release and run data-integrity reconciliation on affected forms

Failure_Mode: Duplicate suppression path is race-prone and metadata failure handling has an undefined-variable exception path
Owner_Role: Application Engineering Lead + Data Governance Lead
Trigger_Threshold: Duplicate hash collision incidents or preprocessing metadata exception path defects in release candidates
Mitigation_Plan: Implement transactional duplicate guard and fix metadata exception handling paths
Contingency_Plan: Route potentially duplicated forms to mandatory manual adjudication

Failure_Mode: Build and schema provenance rely on install-time side effects and vendored nested VCS metadata in shipped schema assets
Trigger_Threshold: Release build depends on unmanaged postinstall side effects or ships nested VCS metadata in schema assets
Mitigation_Plan: Move to pinned workspace build flow and remove nested VCS metadata from shipped artifacts
Contingency_Plan: Restrict release evidence to reproducible build artifacts only

Failure_Mode: Artifact transport and deployment paths explicitly bypass signature verification and trust-policy enforcement
Trigger_Threshold: Any release artifact transfer/deploy path uses signature-verification bypass flags or permissive trust policy
Mitigation_Plan: Enforce signed artifact verification and remove permissive policy fallbacks from deploy/export tooling
Contingency_Plan: Block release and require provenance attestation for impacted artifacts

Failure_Mode: Workflow use_localstack control-path bypass can disable NLP/PHI controls in non-local environments
Trigger_Threshold: Any non-local deployment/workflow module with use_localstack=true, or any execution path skipping NLP/PHI controls via localstack branch
Mitigation_Plan: Add environment guardrails that hard-fail non-local runs when use_localstack=true and enforce policy checks in CI/IaC review
Contingency_Plan: Halt release, disable bypass paths, and reprocess affected forms through full control path

Failure_Mode: Step Functions/Lambda logging paths can expose sensitive execution payload content during normal/error processing
Trigger_Threshold: Any workflow log/error publish event containing disallowed sensitive fields or unredacted execution payload
Mitigation_Plan: Redact/minimize workflow payload logging, restrict execution-data logging posture, and add sensitive-field detection alerts
Contingency_Plan: Freeze release, restrict log access, and execute retrospective exposure review with remediation evidence

Failure_Mode: Cross-service schema contract governance is non-authoritative and non-versioned, allowing silent web/lambda/Dynamo drift
Owner_Role: Application Engineering Lead + Data Governance Lead
Trigger_Threshold: Any release-significant interface without versioned schema + compatibility test coverage, or any unresolved contract mismatch
Mitigation_Plan: Establish canonical schema authority, versioning policy, and compatibility gates across web/lambda/Dynamo interfaces
Contingency_Plan: Block integration of affected interface changes and require manual validation + rollback plan

Failure_Mode: Deep workflow payload pass-through and text-heavy outputs can exceed Step Functions state-size limits
Trigger_Threshold: Any States.DataLimitExceeded/payload-size workflow failure or p95 state payload >200KB in release-candidate runs
Mitigation_Plan: Move large payloads to object-storage references and enforce payload-budget checks in workflow contracts
Contingency_Plan: Route oversized executions to controlled fallback/manual review and pause rollout until payload budget is restored

Failure_Mode: Missing enforced workflow SLO/capacity guardrails for burst-heavy OCR/NLP paths can cause backlog and timeout cascades
Trigger_Threshold: Any release-significant workflow missing defined SLOs, or sustained latency/backlog/error threshold breach in rehearsal
Mitigation_Plan: Define workflow SLOs and capacity thresholds, then enforce pre-release burst/concurrency validation gates
Contingency_Plan: Throttle intake and defer release until capacity mitigations and rerun evidence are approved
